message:
🐛 Fix Learn dropdown invisible in Firefox — portal to document.body (#10319) (#10326)

The Learn dropdown panel was rendered as an absolutely positioned child
inside the navbar's overflow-x-clip container.  In Firefox (and
potentially other browsers) this caused the panel to be clipped by
the parent nav, making the dropdown invisible when toggled open.

Fix: render the dropdown via createPortal into document.body so it
escapes any ancestor overflow/stacking-context constraints.  Position
is computed from the trigger button's bounding rect and updated on
resize/scroll.  The click-outside handler now checks both the trigger
button ref and the portaled dropdown ref.

Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
